Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ActivityFieldHistory

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ActivityFieldHistory
public class ActivityFieldHistory extends SObject

Java class for ActivityFieldHistory complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ActivityFieldHistory">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Activity" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Task" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActivityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChangedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChangedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChangedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DataType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDataAvailable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NewValueDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NewValueNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NewValueText" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OldValueDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OldValueNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OldValueText" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Operation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
